     The Numbers Business Report

Black and Blue (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $22,012,729Details
International Box Office $717,415
Worldwide Box Office $22,730,144
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,536,128
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,292,161
Total $2,828,289
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A rookie cop inadvertently captures the murder of a young drug dealer on her body cam. After realizing that the murder was committed by corrupt cops, she teams up with the one person from her community who is willing to help her as she tries to escape both the criminals out for revenge and the police who are desperate to destroy the incriminating footage.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,376,846 (38.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.63 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:96.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,062 opening theaters/2,062 max. theaters, 2.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $28,741,507

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 25th, 2019 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: October 23rd, 2019 (Wide) (Trinidad)
October 23rd, 2019 (Wide) (Jamaica)
October 24th, 2019 (Wide) (Aruba)
October 24th, 2019 (Wide) (Curacao)
October 24th, 2019 (Wide) (Suriname)
Video Release: December 31st, 2019 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
March 2nd, 2020 by Sony Pictures
MPA Rating: R for violence and language.
(Rating bulletin 2600 (Cert #52040), 10/16/2019)
Running Time: 108 minutes
Plot point: Beat Cops, Corrupt Cops, Drug Dealer, Framed, Fugitive / On the Run, Gangs, Revenge
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Royal Viking Entertainment, Hidden Empire Film Group, Screen Gems
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

A rookie cop inadvertently captures the murder of a young drug dealer on her body cam.
